name: Light Hex
description: Light Hex is a Light element alter ego of the Undead Skylander Hex, in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Though she is also a support character like her original counterpart, she works with buffs instead of debuffs, becoming more powerful and even taking them from her opponents.
biography: Light Hex is the alter ego of the undead elf wizard Hex. This ego refuses to go back to being a talented wizard before becoming an undead. She used to control powerful magic in the past, but she was also clearly conceited - she turned into an undead because of her recklessness. Therefore, Light Hex accepts the power of the Light Element to embrace her allies, instead of the power that was strong yet cold-hearted. Of course, when it comes to dealing with evil forces, she will burn her enemies with the magic of light!
quote: When it comes to dealing with evil forces, she will burn her enemies with the magic of light!
personality: Light Hex accepts the power of the Light Element to embrace her allies, instead of the power that was strong yet cold-hearted. She is determined to use her light magic to burn evil forces, showing a shift from her previously conceited and reckless nature.
trivia: Though Light Hex's first ability is called Lightcore Orbs, only her regular counterpart in the game has the LightCore appearance. In the Reboot Update, the ability name was adjusted.
She was temporarily absent in the revamped version of Ring of Heroes, up until the Guardian Subjugation update on March 2021.
As of Ring of Heroes, Light Hex is the only Light-aligned undead creature.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, Light Hex is a support character that works with buffs instead of debuffs, becoming more powerful and even taking them from her opponents. She focuses on copying enemy beneficial effects and providing recovery and skill cooldown reduction for her allies.

basic.name: Light Marble
basic.content: [1 enemy] Inflicts 40% of ATK as damage 2 time(s) to 1 enemy, and inflicts 20% of ATK as damage to 1 random enemy 2 more times if you possess 3+ buff effects.

basic.name: Vanish into Thin Air
basic.content: [1 Enemy] Inflicts 60% of ATK as damage to 1 enemy. Additionally, copies 1 random beneficial effect of the target to all enemies with a 70% chance if the target possesses beneficial effects.

basic.name: Light Rain
basic.content: [All Allies] After charging for 3 turns, decreases the cooldown time of all skills of all allies by 1 turn.

soulgems.name: Recovery Light
soulgems.content: [All Allies] Recovers all allies by 10% of each target's MAX HP whenever you're designated as the attack target for the 6th time. (Not counted when the attack is evaded.)

wow_pows.name: Light Acceleration
wow_pows.content: [All Allies] Light Hex's charging skills will be changed temporarily to be [instantly activated] if you have 4+ buff effects when the turn begins. (Not applied if charging is already in progress.) Additionally, increases your Effect Resistance Rate by 15% in battle. Leader Effect: Increases the Effect Resistance Rate of allies by 15% in battle.
